parameters.name: huemin
parameters.label: Hue Min
parameters.description: The minimum hue value that is added to the chroma key. 0 = min, 360 = max.

parameters.name: huemax
parameters.label: Hue Max
parameters.description: The maximum hue value that is added to the key. 0 = min, 360 = max.

parameters.name: hsoftlow
parameters.label: Hue Soft Low
parameters.description: The rate of falloff at the Hue Min setting.

parameters.name: hsofthigh
parameters.label: Hue Soft High
parameters.description: The rate of falloff at the Hue Max setting.

parameters.name: satmin
parameters.label: Sat Min
parameters.description: The minimum saturation value that is added to the key.

parameters.name: satmax
parameters.label: Sat Max
parameters.description: The maximum saturation value that is added to the key.

parameters.name: ssoftlow
parameters.label: Sat Soft Low
parameters.description: The rate of falloff at the Sat Min setting.

parameters.name: ssofthigh
parameters.label: Sat Soft High
parameters.description: The rate of falloff at the Sat Max setting.

parameters.name: valmin
parameters.label: Val Min
parameters.description: The minimum value that is added to the key.

parameters.name: valmax
parameters.label: Val Max
parameters.description: The maximum value that is added to the key.

parameters.name: vsoftlow
parameters.label: Val Soft Low
parameters.description: The rate off falloff at the Val Min setting.

parameters.name: vsofthigh
parameters.label: Val Soft High
parameters.description: The rate of falloff at the Val Max setting.

parameters.name: invert
parameters.label: Invert New Alpha
parameters.description: Inverts the key that is created.

parameters.name: rgbout
parameters.label: RGB Output
parameters.description: Determines the output of the RGB channels from the Chroma Key .

parameters.name: alphaout
parameters.label: Alpha Output
parameters.description: Determines the output of the Alpha channel from the Chroma Key .
